name: MCA Inclusive Expressions
description: Core enhancement mod for MCA Reborn (Minecraft Comes Alive) providing dedicated Breast sub-tabs, nested sub-categories ([ Size ], [ Position ], [ Rotation ]), 100% independent 3D left and right breast model part MatrixStack scaling, 2.0x base scale calibration at 100% size, orthogonal 6-axis 3D position customization ignoring rotation angles (Up is Up, Left is Left, Forward is Forward), 3-axis 3D Euler rotation control (Pitch X, Yaw Y, Roll Z), direct GUI screen genetics access preview synchronization, C2S network packet packaging and server-side whitelist persistence for Villagers and Players, dedicated bolded GameRule category and lang localization, foreground tooltip rendering engine, 100% individualized genetic NBT persistence engine, GameRule-governed max scale limits, real-time 3D model preview rendering, and gender-inclusive body feature customization.
